mapper.sql: select b.buyer_id, b.buyer_no, b.buyer_code, b.buyer_name, b.buyer_short_name, b.buyer_type, b.buyer_level, b.status, owner_link.user_name as username, b.legal_id, b.business_license_no, b.country_code, b.state_province, b.city, b.postal_code, b.address_line1, b.address_line2, b.contact_name, b.contact_phone, b.contact_email, b.attachment_file_name, b.attachment_mime_type, b.attachment_size_bytes, b.attachment_file_url, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, coalesce(account_stat.account_count, 0) as account_count, owner_link.last_login_time as last_login_time, cast(0.00 as decimal(18,2)) as account_balance, 'USD' as balance_currency

left join buyer_account owner_link on owner_link.buyer_id = b.buyer_id and owner_link.account_role = 'OWNER' and owner_link.buyer_account_id = ( select min(owner_pick.buyer_account_id) from buyer_account owner_pick where owner_pick.buyer_id = b.buyer_id and owner_pick.account_role = 'OWNER' ) left join ( select buyer_id, count(*) as account_count from buyer_account group by buyer_id ) account_stat on account_stat.buyer_id = b.buyer_id
mapper.select:
from buyer b
where 1 = 1
and b.buyer_no like concat('%', #{buyerNo}, '%')
and b.buyer_code like concat('%', #{buyerCode}, '%')
and b.buyer_name like concat('%', #{buyerName}, '%')
and b.buyer_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%')
and b.buyer_short_name like concat('%', #{buyerShortName}, '%')
and owner_link.user_name like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and b.buyer_level = #{buyerLevel}
and b.status = #{status}
and b.contact_phone like concat('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
and b.country_code = #{countryCode}
and b.state_province like concat('%', #{stateProvince}, '%')
and b.city like concat('%', #{city}, '%')
and date_format(b.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.createBeginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(b.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.createEndTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(owner_link.last_login_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.lastLoginBeginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(owner_link.last_login_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.lastLoginEndTime},'%Y%m%d')
and cast(0.00 as decimal(18,2)) >= cast(#{params.balanceMin} as decimal(18,2))
and cast(0.00 as decimal(18,2)) <= cast(#{params.balanceMax} as decimal(18,2))
order by b.create_time desc, b.buyer_id desc
select max(buyer_no) from buyer where buyer_no like concat(#{buyerNoPrefix}, '%') and length(buyer_no) = 9
mapper.insert: insert into buyer( buyer_no, buyer_code, buyer_name, buyer_short_name, buyer_type, buyer_level, status, legal_id, business_license_no, country_code, state_province, city, postal_code, address_line1, address_line2, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, attachment_file_name, attachment_mime_type, attachment_size_bytes, attachment_file_url, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{buyerNo}, #{buyerCode}, #{buyerName}, #{buyerShortName}, #{buyerType}, #{buyerLevel}, #{status}, #{legalId}, #{businessLicenseNo}, #{countryCode}, #{stateProvince}, #{city}, #{postalCode}, #{addressLine1}, #{addressLine2}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{attachmentFileName}, #{attachmentMimeType}, #{attachmentSizeBytes}, #{attachmentFileUrl}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update buyer set buyer_code = #{buyerCode}, buyer_name = #{buyerName}, buyer_short_name = #{buyerShortName}, buyer_type = #{buyerType}, buyer_level = #{buyerLevel}, status = #{status}, legal_id = #{legalId}, business_license_no = #{businessLicenseNo}, country_code = #{countryCode}, state_province = #{stateProvince}, city = #{city}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address_line1 = #{addressLine1}, address_line2 = #{addressLine2}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, attachment_file_name = #{attachmentFileName}, attachment_mime_type = #{attachmentMimeType}, attachment_size_bytes = #{attachmentSizeBytes}, attachment_file_url = #{attachmentFileUrl}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where buyer_id = #{buyerId}
update buyer set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where buyer_id = #{buyerId}
mapper.select: select a.buyer_account_id, a.buyer_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from buyer_account a left join buyer_dept d on d.buyer_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.buyer_id = a.buyer_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.buyer_id = #{buyerId} order by a.create_time desc, a.buyer_account_id desc

select a.buyer_account_id, a.buyer_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.password, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from buyer_account a left join buyer_dept d on d.buyer_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.buyer_id = a.buyer_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId} limit 1

select a.buyer_account_id, a.buyer_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.password, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from buyer_account a left join buyer_dept d on d.buyer_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.buyer_id = a.buyer_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.user_name = #{userName} limit 1

select a.buyer_account_id, a.buyer_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from buyer_account a left join buyer_dept d on d.buyer_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.buyer_id = a.buyer_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.buyer_id = #{buyerId} and a.account_role = 'OWNER' order by a.buyer_account_id asc limit 1
mapper.update: update buyer_account set nick_name = #{nickName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, email = #{email}, phonenumber = #{phonenumber}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId}
update buyer_account set password = #{password}, pwd_update_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId}
update buyer_account set last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = sysdate() where buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId}
mapper.select: select token_id as tokenId, 'buyer' as terminal, buyer_id as subjectId, buyer_account_id as accountId, user_name as userName, login_ip as loginIp, login_time as loginTime, expire_time as expireTime, logout_time as logoutTime, status from buyer_session where buyer_id = #{buyerId} and buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId} order by login_time desc, token_id desc

select token_id from buyer_session where buyer_id = #{buyerId} and status = '0' and logout_time is null and expire_time >= sysdate()
and buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId}
mapper.update:
update buyer_session set status = '1', logout_time = sysdate() where buyer_id = #{buyerId} and status = '0' and logout_time is null and expire_time >= sysdate()
and buyer_account_id = #{buyerAccountId}
